generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Your community's safety is at risk! While we all want to be prepared, excessive civil defense spending just drains resources from real security needs. Local leaders pushing for more shelters and drills are out of touch with our actual threats. Focus on what truly protects us - smart investments, not fear-mongering. #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
